_comment: MINIMAL overrides only. Do NOT add values here that can be discovered dynamically via API calls, probes, or AI estimation. Results are persisted in model_catalog.json. See DEVELOPMENT.md for the policy on static model data.

estimator._comment: Model used by Djinnite maintenance scripts (cost estimation, modality estimation, output limit estimation). Separate from the user's default_model in ai_config.json. Should be a model with good web search integration for current pricing data.

vision_defaults._comment: Provider-level image input limits. Applied as defaults for vision-capable models during catalog update. AI estimation may refine per-model.
